SANDOR
Week 7: The eComm Sales Process And Checklist
…And The Best PayDay One-To-Many Presentation
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 12 --

eComm
• Also known as “selling real stuff”.
• Makeup, vitamins, pet supplies, etc.
• Higher volume, lower margins compared to information and services.
• Big pain points are often increased costs in getting customers and
thinning margins.
• Relatively simple to fix because 99.99999% of them don’t do super basic
stuff.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 12 --

Typical Sales Process (Swear To God)
www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 12 --

Tools
• Shopify
• Zipify
• Drip (really good eComm CRM)
• Any other CRM (might need Zapier to integrate)
www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 12 --

eComm Sales Process Checklist
Big Picture Numbers
Monthly Visitors:
Monthly Ad Spend:
Monthly Gross Revenue:
Monthly Net Revenue:
Monthly New Customers:
Monthly New Leads:
Avg Customer Value:
Cost To Acquire:
Net Per Customer:
Two-Step Order Form?
Order Bump?
OTO?
Downsell?
OTO 2?
Exit Intent Pop On OTO?
Deadline Sequence To Non-Buyers Of Bump?
Deadline Sequence To Non-Buyers Of OTOs?
Sales Process Component Checklist
Retargeting Ads To Non-Buyers?
Sales Page Conversion Rate
Order Form Conversion Rate
Pre-Sale Page CTR
Order Form Step-1 Conversion Rate
Order Bump Conversion Rate
OTO 1 Conversion Rate
OTO 2 Conversion Rate
OTO 3 Conversion Rate
Number Of Emails In Follow Up To Cart Abandons
Deadline Sequence To Cart Abandons?
Number Of Emails In Follow Up For Bump
Number Of Emails In Follow Up For OTO 1
Number Of Emails In Follow Up For OTO 2
Number Of Emails In Follow Up For OTO 3
Process Component Numbers
Email Sequence Numbers
Main Follow Up O/R:
Main Follow Up CTR:
Cart Abandon O/R:
Cart Abandon CTR:
Bump Abandon O/R:
Bump Abandon CTR:
OTO 1 Abandon O/R:
OTO 1 Abandon CTR:
OTO 2 Abandon O/R:
OTO 2 Abandon CTR:
OTO 3 Abandon O/R:
OTO 3 Abandon CTR:
G.O.O.
www.getwsodo.com
